## ✅ Type of change / 改动类型

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📖 Documentation update
- [ ] 🧹 Refactoring / code cleanup
- [ ] 🧪 Test improvements

## 🧪 Tested on / 测试环境

- [ ] Windows
- [ ] Linux
- [ ] Tested with a real Hikvision device (model: ____)
- [ ] `python tests/test_integration.py` shows **22/22 passing**

## 📋 Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's existing style (PEP 8, snake_case, Chinese docstrings on public APIs)
- [ ] `from __future__ import annotations` is present in any new module that uses modern type hints
- [ ] I have added/updated tests that prove my fix or feature works
- [ ] I have updated the README / demo when adding a public API
- [ ] No new third-party dependencies were introduced (besides `numpy` and `opencv-python`)
- [ ] I have NOT modified files in `hikvision_sdk/_bindings/_*_official.py` (those mirror Hikvision's official binding)
